testcase.name: test_payment_methods_unauthenticated

failure.message: AssertionError: Unauthenticated requests should be rejected assert 403 == 401 + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_p2_p3_features.py:90: in test_payment_methods_unauthenticated assert response.status_code == 401, "Unauthenticated requests should be rejected" E AssertionError: Unauthenticated requests should be rejected E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_roles_admin
testcase.failure: tests/test_p2_p3_features.py:130: in test_get_roles_admin assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin should be able to get roles: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin should be able to get roles: {"detail":"Permission denied. Required permission: access.view_roles"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_custom_role_admin
testcase.failure: tests/test_p2_p3_features.py:147: in test_create_custom_role_admin assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Admin should be able to create custom roles: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Admin should be able to create custom roles: {"detail":"Permission denied. Required permission: access.create_roles"} E assert 403 in [200, 201] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
